General.Name: True Partner Capital Holding Ltd
General.Description: True Partner Capital Holding Limited engages in the fund management business in Hong Kong and Chicago. It operates through Asset Management and Consultancy Services, and Derivative Trading segments. The company manages funds and managed accounts; and engages in limited trading of proprietary capital. It also provides management, business consultancy, software sublicence, consultancy, investment management, software development and supporting, training courses and seminars, investor relations, market and market research, and technology services; and acts as investment manager. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: The Gateway, Tower 5, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
